history.created_by: RUN |1 RPMS_TO_INSTALL=python3 python3-libs python3-pip python3-setuptools python3-wheel /bin/sh -c RPMS_PATH="/dockerStage/RPMS";     LOCAL_REPO_PATH="/localrepo";     mkdir -p $LOCAL_REPO_PATH;     tdnf install -y createrepo;     cp -r ${RPMS_PATH} ${LOCAL_REPO_PATH};     cat /dockerStage/azurelinuxlocal.repo >> /etc/yum.repos.d/local.repo;     createrepo --compatibility --database ${LOCAL_REPO_PATH} --workers 10; tdnf makecache;     tdnf autoremove -y createrepo;     for rpm in "${RPMS_TO_INSTALL[@]}"; do        echo "RPM: $rpm";        tdnf install -y $rpm;     done;     tdnf clean all;     rm -f /etc/yum.repos.d/local.repo;     rm -rf /var/cache/tdnf;     rm -rf ${LOCAL_REPO_PATH}; # buildkit
RUN |1 RPMS_TO_INSTALL=python3 python3-libs python3-pip python3-setuptools python3-wheel /bin/sh -c python3 --version # buildkit
RUN /bin/sh -c tdnf -y update &&     tdnf -y install ca-certificates &&     update-ca-trust &&     tdnf clean all # buildkit

RUN /bin/sh -c tdnf -y install     gcc gcc-c++ make binutils     bison flex     pkg-config     tcl-devel     readline-devel     libffi-devel     glibc-devel     kernel-headers     zlib-devel     gawk     git     curl     tar     gzip     && tdnf clean all # buildkit

RUN /bin/sh -c mkdir -p /tmp/yosys-build && cd /tmp/yosys-build &&     curl -L -o yosys.tar.gz https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/releases/download/v0.65/yosys.tar.gz &&     tar xzf yosys.tar.gz &&     make config-gcc &&     CXXFLAGS="-w" make -j$(nproc) PREFIX=/usr/local &&     make install PREFIX=/usr/local &&     cd / && rm -rf /tmp/yosys-build /tmp/*.tar.gz # buildkit
RUN /bin/sh -c yosys -V && which yosys-abc || echo "ABC bundled with Yosys" # buildkit

RUN /bin/sh -c mkdir -p /app/pdk &&     curl -L -o /app/pdk/sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib     "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD-flow-scripts/master/flow/platforms/sky130hd/lib/sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib" &&     test -s /app/pdk/sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib &&     echo "SKY130 lib: $(wc -c < /app/pdk/sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib) bytes" # buildkit

RUN /bin/sh -c curl -L -o /app/pdk/gf180mcu_fd_sc_mcu7t5v0__tt_025C_3v30.lib.gz     "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD-flow-scripts/master/flow/platforms/gf180/lib/gf180mcu_fd_sc_mcu7t5v0__tt_025C_3v30.lib.gz" &&     gunzip /app/pdk/gf180mcu_fd_sc_mcu7t5v0__tt_025C_3v30.lib.gz &&     test -s /app/pdk/gf180mcu_fd_sc_mcu7t5v0__tt_025C_3v30.lib &&     echo "GF180 lib: $(wc -c < /app/pdk/gf180mcu_fd_sc_mcu7t5v0__tt_025C_3v30.lib) bytes" # buildkit
RUN /bin/sh -c tdnf -y remove gcc gcc-c++ make bison flex git gawk &&     tdnf clean all || true # buildkit
